schema.title: Response List Members Agencies Me Members Get
Response List Roles Agencies Me Roles Get
Response List Invitations Agencies Me Invitations Get
Response List Notes Cases  Case Id  Notes Get
Response List Documents As Agent Cases  Case Id  Documents Get
Response List Documents As Expat Expat Cases  Case Id  Documents Get
Response List My Cases Expat Cases Get
Response List Notifications Expat Cases  Case Id  Notifications Get
Response List Job Runs Jobs  Job Id  Runs Get
Response Reorder Steps Journeys  Template Id  Steps Order Put
Response Assign Journey Cases  Case Id  Journey Post
Response Get Timeline Cases  Case Id  Steps Get
Response List Message Templates Message Templates Get

get.description: The agency calendar view: agency-scoped, not per-case.

patch.description:
On a system role this is copy-on-write: the agency gets a custom
clone (rebinding its wearers) and the rename lands on the clone.

put.description: Copy-on-write on system roles, same as PATCH.

get.description:
Readiness probe for fly.io's HTTP healthcheck.

Actively touches the DB (single `SELECT 1`) so a frozen pool or a
dead Supabase connection surfaces as 503 instead of a 200 from a
process that can't actually serve requests. Fly removes the
machine from the LB on sustained failures and restarts it.

ActivateResponse.title: ActivateResponse
ActivateResponse.description:
Either a fresh token pair (account just activated, logged in) or
`already_active=True` with no tokens (2nd invitation of an existing
account — password untouched, go through login).

AgencyUpdateRequest.title: AgencyUpdateRequest
AgencyUpdateRequest.description:
`slug` is deliberately absent: immutable at MVP (public
identifier — changing it would break links and logs).

CaseCreateRequest.title: CaseCreateRequest
CaseCreateRequest.description:
Principal-only create: family members and external contacts go
through their own endpoints.

CaseNoteUpdateRequest.title: CaseNoteUpdateRequest
CaseNoteUpdateRequest.description:
`is_confidential` is immutable after creation — flipping it
would silently move the note across the visibility boundary.

DashboardResponse.title: DashboardResponse
DashboardResponse.description:
Simple counts, agency-scoped. NOTHING more — rich analytics is
V1.5 and stays there.

DocumentResponse.title: DocumentResponse
DocumentResponse.description:
`storage_path` is deliberately NOT exposed — the path is
technical, the (original) filename is the display data.

ExpatNotificationResponse.title: ExpatNotificationResponse
ExpatNotificationResponse.description:
A SENT in_app reminder IS the notification (Q8 — no extra table).
Its own id stays: the V1.5 mark-as-read will need it.

ExpatReferentResponse.title: ExpatReferentResponse
ExpatReferentResponse.description:
The named human contact at the agency (the case owner) —
the brief: « nom du référent + son mail ».

ExpatResponsibleResponse.title: ExpatResponsibleResponse
ExpatResponsibleResponse.description:
Displayable responsible: type 'agency' (no internal agent name —
staffing doesn't face the client), 'you', or 'external' with the
contact's name. type None = not assigned yet.

ImpersonationTokenResponse.title: ImpersonationTokenResponse
ImpersonationTokenResponse.description:
Access token ONLY — no refresh token by design: the 30-minute
expiry IS the exit from impersonation.

ImpersonatorInfo.title: ImpersonatorInfo
ImpersonatorInfo.description:
Present on /me when the token was issued by impersonation —
the frontend banner reads it.

PrincipalSummaryResponse.title: PrincipalSummaryResponse
PrincipalSummaryResponse.description:
Identity subset for list items — the full PrincipalResponse
(activated) stays a detail-endpoint concern.

ReminderCreateRequest.title: ReminderCreateRequest
ReminderCreateRequest.description:
Body source: message_template_id OR free-text message_body (at
least one). Variables are interpolated SERVER-side at creation —
the approver reads the exact final text.

ReminderStatus.title: ReminderStatus
ReminderStatus.description:
Mandatory manual approval: TO_APPROVE → APPROVED → SENT,
or CANCELLED. No send ever happens before APPROVED.

ReminderUpdateRequest.title: ReminderUpdateRequest
ReminderUpdateRequest.description:
Any edit of an APPROVED reminder sends it back to TO_APPROVE —
the approval covers exactly what goes out.

ResponsibleType.title: ResponsibleType
ResponsibleType.description:
Polymorphic responsible of a step (also used for
`journey_template_step.default_responsible_type`).

RoleDetailResponse.title: RoleDetailResponse
RoleDetailResponse.description:
Mutation responses carry the full matrix so the Settings screen
never needs a follow-up GET. `cloned_from_role_id` set = this is
the agency's copy-on-write clone of a system role.

StepOrderRequest.title: StepOrderRequest
StepOrderRequest.description: Full list of the template's step ids in the desired order.

StepPrerequisitesRequest.title: StepPrerequisitesRequest
StepPrerequisitesRequest.description:
Declarative: replaces the step's full prerequisite set — the
whole template graph is re-validated on every mutation.

StepProgressUpdateRequest.title: StepProgressUpdateRequest
StepProgressUpdateRequest.description:
Status transitions and/or responsible assignment. Unset fields
are untouched (model_fields_set semantics); `responsible_type=None`
explicitly CLEARS the responsible.

TemplateStepCreateRequest.title: TemplateStepCreateRequest
TemplateStepCreateRequest.description:
No `position`: new steps are APPENDED; ordering is managed only
through the declarative reorder endpoint.
